title: Donna Reese Honorary Street Sign Installation Planning
summary: Council member Jones-Rowser presents items 33-42; item 33 (building code update) continues to be held. Announces honorary street sign for Donna Reese with installation planned for February 20th or 27th; date to be announced at next meeting. Full history of Donna Reese to be presented at next study session. All council members agreed to co-sponsor.
raw_content:
[00:09:07] >> Thank you, Madam President. I have items
[00:09:08] 33 through 42. Um item 33 will continue
[00:09:13] to be held. Um I believe all other
[00:09:15] items. Yes. All other items are ready.
[00:09:18] Um we also have the honorary street sign
[00:09:22] for U. Mrs. Donna Reese
[00:09:26] um that we will we're looking to um
[00:09:29] install either February 20th or 27th. We
[00:09:33] that date will be determined um soon and
[00:09:37] it will be announced um at our next
[00:09:39] meeting. Uh I'll give the history of
[00:09:43] Donna at our study session. that you
[00:09:46] might um invite other counselors on
[00:09:48] board.
[00:09:48] >> Yes. Um all the other counselors did
[00:09:50] agree to uh go in on that. Yes. And
[00:09:54] thank you guys.
[00:09:55] >> Thank you very much. Uh councelor

political_signal.description: Unanimous council support for community recognition of longtime resident

processing_notes: Connects to Jan 21 study session seg 16 (-26j2mt6jMU) where honorary sign was first introduced
Installation date and full history to be presented at following sessions
